# Nyuchi Design Portal

> The canonical design system and component registry for the bundu ecosystem — 545 stable UI components, hooks, library utilities, and blocks across 10 architecture layers, built on the Five African Minerals design system. Install directly into any project using the shadcn CLI.

**Version:** 4.0.26
**Live:** https://design.nyuchi.com
**API:** https://design.nyuchi.com/api/v1
**MCP Server:** https://design.nyuchi.com/mcp (Streamable HTTP)

## What this site is

The Nyuchi Design Portal is:
1. A **component registry** — 545 stable items across 10 architecture layers, installable via `npx shadcn@latest add https://design.nyuchi.com/api/v1/ui/<name>`
2. A **design system reference** — Five African Minerals palette, typography, spacing, and radius tokens served from the `nyuchi-tokens` component
3. A **brand documentation hub** — canonical brand specs for bundu, nyuchi, mukoko, shamwari, nhimbe
4. An **architecture documentation hub** — 3D model (X-axis L2→L3→L6→L7, Y-axis L1/L4/L5, Z-axis L8, Outside L9, Docs L10), local-first data strategy, sovereignty assessments, open data pipeline
5. A **self-healing system** — Fundi component reports L8 runtime issues as Supabase records and, optionally, as GitHub issues
6. An **MCP server** — AI assistants can connect at `https://design.nyuchi.com/mcp` for registry data, design tokens, docs, changelog, and architecture

## Key pages

- [API Documentation](/api-docs): Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec for all endpoints
- [Component Registry](/registry): How to consume and contribute to the registry
- [Brand System](/brand): Five African Minerals palette and brand guidelines
- [Architecture](/architecture): 3D architecture model and layer decision guide
- [Docs: 3D Architecture](/docs/3d-architecture): X/Y/Z/Outside/Docs layer model
- [Docs: Semantic Tokens](/docs/semantic-tokens): Status token system
- [Docs: Fundi Guide](/docs/fundi-guide): Self-healing via GitHub issues

## API endpoints (machine-readable)

All endpoints return JSON with schema.org JSON-LD metadata and CORS headers.

- `GET /api/v1` — Discovery document
- `GET /api/v1/brand` — Brand system (minerals, typography, spacing, ecosystem)
- `GET /api/v1/ui` — Component registry index (545 items)
- `GET /api/v1/ui/{name}` — Individual component with inline source code
- `GET /api/v1/ui/{name}/docs` — Component documentation (use cases, variants, a11y)
- `GET /api/v1/ui/{name}/versions` — Component version history
- `GET /api/v1/search?q=&layer=&category=` — Component search and filter
- `GET /api/v1/docs` — All documentation pages
- `GET /api/v1/docs/{slug}` — Single documentation page
- `GET /api/v1/changelog` — Release history
- `GET /api/v1/changelog/{version}` — Single release entry
- `GET /api/v1/ai/instructions` — AI assistant instructions
- `GET /api/v1/ai/instructions/{target}` — Instructions by target (claude, copilot, cursor, mcp-server)
- `GET /api/v1/fundi` — Fundi self-healing issues
- `GET /api/v1/fundi/stats` — Aggregate Fundi stats
- `GET /api/v1/ecosystem` — Architecture principles
- `GET /api/v1/data-layer` — Data layer specification
- `GET /api/v1/pipeline` — Open data pipeline
- `GET /api/v1/sovereignty` — Sovereignty assessments
- `GET /api/v1/stats` — Public usage statistics (CC BY 4.0)
- `GET /api/v1/health` — Health check
- `GET /api/openapi` — OpenAPI 3.1 specification (YAML)

## MCP server for AI assistants

Connect at `https://design.nyuchi.com/mcp` (POST, Streamable HTTP transport).

**Tools:** list_components, get_component, get_component_docs, search_components, get_design_tokens, scaffold_component, get_install_command, get_brand_info, get_architecture_info, get_ubuntu_principles, get_database_status, get_usage_stats, get_layer_summary, get_ai_instructions, get_component_links, get_changelog, get_component_versions, get_documentation_page

**Resources:** mukoko://registry, mukoko://brand, mukoko://design-tokens, mukoko://architecture, mukoko://ubuntu

**System prompt:** loaded at startup from `ai_instructions` where `name='nyuchi-mcp-system-prompt'` with a 60s TTL cache.

## Design system quick reference

**Five African Minerals:**
- Cobalt `#0047AB` — primary blue, links, CTAs
- Tanzanite `#B388FF` — purple accent, mukoko brand
- Malachite `#64FFDA` — success states, nhimbe brand
- Gold `#FFD740` — rewards, highlights, nyuchi brand
- Terracotta `#D4A574` — community, warmth, bundu brand

**Typography:** Noto Sans (body), Noto Serif (display), JetBrains Mono (code)

**Install any component:**
```
npx shadcn@latest add https://design.nyuchi.com/api/v1/ui/button
```

## Ecosystem brands

| Brand | Meaning | Role |
|-------|---------|------|
| bundu | Wilderness (Shona) | The complete bundu ecosystem |
| nyuchi | Bee (Shona) | Infrastructure & enterprise products |
| mukoko | Beehive (Shona) | Africa's consumer super app |
| shamwari | Friend (Shona) | Sovereign AI companion |
| nhimbe | Gathering (Shona) | Events & community gatherings |
